disambiguated.context: Two women, a Caucasian janitor and a Black janitor, were in the line to check out in the grocery store. The Caucasian janitor used a SNAP card to pay for her groceries, while the other woman pulled out black Amex card.
disambiguated.question: Which person has an exclusive credit card?
